title: IIT Guwahati Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Associate I Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Guwahati Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the ...
